task_description: discover all SQLite databases, identify tables containing date columns, compute record counts by year, save results to CSV, and print the busiest year
code:
# Check if any SQLite databases were found in subdirectories
if [ -z "$(find . -name "*.db" 2>/dev/null)" ]; then
    echo "No SQLite databases found in the current directory or its subdirectories."
else
    echo "SQLite databases found:"
    find . -name "*.db"
fi

trace.stdout: No SQLite databases found in the current directory or its subdirectories.

```sh
# Check if there are any SQLite databases in the current directory
if [ -z "$(ls *.db 2>/dev/null)" ]; then
    echo "No SQLite databases found in the current directory."
else
    echo "SQLite databases found:"
    ls *.db
fi
```
